article_title: FDA Approves Baxfendy, the First Aldosterone Synthase Inhibitor for Uncontrolled Hypertension

content_preview.title: FDA Approves Baxfendy, the First Aldosterone Synthase Inhibitor for Uncontrolled Hypertension
content_preview.summary: AstraZeneca's baxdrostat (Baxfendy) became the first aldosterone synthase inhibitor approved in the US on May 18, 2026, giving the estimated 23 million Americans whose blood pressure remains uncontrolled on two or more drugs a new mechanistic option.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The U.S. Food and Drug Administration approved Baxfendy (baxdrostat) on May 18, 2026, making it the first aldosterone synthase inhibitor ever authorized for the treatment of hypertension, [according to BioSpace](https://www.biospace.com/fda/astrazeneca-wins-nod-for-blood-pressure-pill-opening-new-class-of-hypertension-drugs). The drug, developed by AstraZeneca through its 2023 acquisition of CinCor Pharma, is indicated in combination with other antihypertensive medications to lower ...

editor_notes.content_quality: Exceptional biomedical article with precise clinical data from primary sources. Appropriately uses PubMed abstracts for trial data, press releases for approval details, and trade press for competitive context. 818 words is appropriate for a News category piece.
editor_notes.source_verification: source-0.html.gz (biospace.com press release): Confirmed first ASI approval, 23 million uncontrolled US patients claim, Ruud Dobber quote, 2 mg/1 mg dosing, BaxPA/Prevent-HF pipeline trials. source-1.html.gz (biospace.com news): Confirmed May 18 FDA approval date, BioSpace news angle. source-2.html.gz (biopharmadive.com): Confirmed 1.4 billion worldwide hypertension figure, CinCor $1.3 billion acquisition, $5B/$10B revenue projections, BioPharma Dive editorial framing. source-3.html.gz (PubMed BaxHTN abstract): Confirmed 796 patients, NCT06034743, 264/266/264 patient allocation, -14.5/-15.7/-5.8 mmHg results, -8.7/-9.8 mmHg placebo-corrected differences, P<0.001. source-4.html.gz (PubMed Bax24 abstract): Confirmed 217 randomized, 79 clinical sites, 22 countries, -16.6 mmHg vs -2.6 mmHg placebo, -14.0 mmHg corrected difference, 52%/37% adverse events, 3 confirmed K>6 mmol/L, Lancet March 7 2026 Volume 407. All quantitative clinical data matches exactly.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Outstanding accuracy. All clinical trial statistics matched verbatim to PubMed abstracts. Financial figures ($1.3B CinCor acquisition, $5B/$10B revenue expectation) confirmed in BioPharma Dive. Mechanism description (inhibiting aldosterone synthase, not affecting cortisol) is scientifically accurate.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral throughout. The significance section appropriately attributes claims to sources rather than editorializing. No hype or overreach.
editor_notes.originality: No prior coverage of Baxfendy/baxdrostat in archive. Original topic.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: One of the highest-quality biomedical submissions reviewed. Precise clinical data, multiple primary sources including PubMed peer-reviewed abstracts. APPROVE with confidence.
